name: PostHog
description: Product analytics, feature flags, and session insights.
notes: Relevant for product analytics and experimentation workflows.
installHint: Authenticate with a PostHog personal API key (PostHog → User settings → API keys, MCP Server preset) — sent as a Bearer token.

auth.credentialPlaceholder: Paste your PostHog personal API key
auth.credentialHelp: Create one under PostHog → User settings → API keys (MCP Server preset). Sent as Authorization: Bearer <token>.
